name: Magazine with 8 Dosing Capsules
summary: Magazine with 8 Dosing Capsules — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Expertly designed for enthusiasts of concentrated substances, the Storz and Bickel Magazine is equipped with eight dosing capsules that can each accommodate over 0.1 grams of dry herbal blends and liquid pads. These versatile capsules are compatible with the Mighty and Crafty+ vaporisers, as well as the Plenty and Volcano (when used with the Easy Valve set and chamber reducer ring). This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
